rooms.name: The Town Square
rooms.description: You are in the center of a bustling town square. A fountain bubbles in the center, and shops line the cobblestone streets.

rooms.name: The Rusty Dragon Inn
rooms.description: The air is thick with the smell of ale and sawdust. A bard is playing a lively tune in the corner.

rooms.name: The Shimmering Potion
rooms.description: Shelves packed with glowing potions and strange ingredients line the walls of this cramped shop. An old alchemist, Elara, looks up as you enter.

npcs.name: Elara
npcs.title: Alchemist
npcs.description: The alchemist, a wizened old woman with a twinkle in her eye.

npcs.name: Gordo
npcs.title: Dwarf
npcs.description: A gruff-looking dwarf with a magnificent beard, currently enjoying a pint of ale.
